summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Polymarket BTC Scalper PHASE 3. All backend APIs (88/88 tests) and frontend UI components tested successfully. Backend is fully functional with Phase 3 features: strict_5m_only filter (default true), auto-cycle to next 5m market, target-price snapshot in market_refs, CLOB-lag detection as primary edge (edge.lag with all subfields), edge_type='lag' or 'model', signals structure with rsi14/ema_fast/ema_slow/convergence_score/label/conflict. Frontend dashboard with all 6 tabs working correctly, including new LIVE trading instructions (7-step guide) in Settings panel.

success_percentage.integration: 100% (WebSocket streaming, real-time data, paper trading active, LIVE mode switch functional)

notes: PHASE 3 features fully implemented and working:
• strict_5m_only filter (default true) with toggle endpoint /api/strict_5m
• Auto-cycle to next 5m market when current expires (visible in orderbook panel)
• Target-price snapshot captured in market_refs object for each 5m market
• CLOB-lag detection as primary edge: edge.lag object with has_lag, direction, spot_delta_pct, mid_delta, expected_mid_delta, lag_score
• edge.edge_type field distinguishes 'lag' (primary) vs 'model' (display only) edges
• Signals structure includes rsi14, ema_fast, ema_slow, convergence_score, label, conflict
• 90s cooldown per market after any close (implemented in runtime.py)
• Realistic paper fills at mid + correct TP/SL exit prices (0.6% TP, -0.4% hard stop)
• Settlement-at-expiry logic (pays 1.0 if won, 0.0 if lost based on spot vs target)
• LIVE credentials setup guide: 7-step instructions in Settings → Wallet & API panel
Paper trading is ACTIVE with 7 trades executed today (equity: $1,009.34, daily PnL: +$9.34).
All WebSocket feeds (Coinbase, OKX, Polymarket) are connected and streaming real-time data.
Force-graph visualization rendering correctly with exactly 100 nodes and 180 edges.
All 6 dashboard tabs (Live Monitor, Signals, Force-Graph, Trades, Risk, Settings) functional.

LIVE mode activation: Successfully switches to LIVE when wallet credentials are configured (even with dummy values for testing). In production, actual order placement would fail with invalid credentials, which is the correct security behavior.
